creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Em Mon, 9 Jun 2008 11:05:33 -0400
The Anarcat <anarcat@anarcat.ath.cx> escreveu:

> Hi,
> 
> The patch seems okay, but I feel I can't review it properly because
> there's a lot of whitespace changes (e.g. changing the path from
> ledger-smb to ledgermb) alongside critical changes (upgrade from 1.1.x
> to 1.2.x).
> 
> So I do not want to block that change but I feel I can't give my
> thumbs up either because the patch is too hard to review just like
> this...
> 
> Could you break it down in smaller pieces?
> 
> A.
> 

Hi,

Don't understand well what did you mean by that. Initially, the port
should have its PORTNAME = ledgersmb, doing justice to the project
name. So I need not have modified the WRKSRC and DISTNAME respectively.
Would you change the PORTNAME or do what? This patch foot ok, I did
several tests before sending it to you.

We also have a new official website: www.ledgersmb.org

Thank you!

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
